title: National Crime Agency annual report and accounts: 2024 to 2025
body: "This annual report and accounts for 2024 to 2025 includes:   a performance report, which shows the agency’s performance against its priorities for 2024 to 2025 and the serious and organised crime threat an accountability report, which outlines the agency’s accountability, assurance, governance and risk processes audited financial statements    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email digitalcommunications@nca.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.  "
